label: 🐍 Python & Data
description: Python development, Jupyter notebooks, and data science tools

extensions.name: Python
extensions.description: Official Python extension. IntelliSense, debugging, linting, and environment management.

extensions.name: Jupyter
extensions.description: Run Jupyter notebooks directly in VS Code without leaving your editor.

extensions.name: Black Formatter
extensions.description: Auto-formats Python code using the Black style guide on save.

extensions.name: Pylint
extensions.description: Lints your Python code and catches errors, warnings, and style issues.

extensions.name: autoDocstring
extensions.description: Generates Python docstrings automatically when you type triple quotes.
